content: Just as 2025’s cutting-edge agentic memory systems store and prioritize accumulated learned experience to enable adaptive long-term agent behavior, the 2025 wave of configurable ICM curiosity mechanisms can act as a dynamic "curiosity index" for memory triage: only novel exploratory experiences that trigger intrinsic reward get encoded into high-priority long-term agent memory, while redundant low-curiosity inputs are discarded to avoid the context overflow plaguing current state-of-the-art active memory architectures.
